text:
REGIME — Risk-on rally, small caps led, energy strong, healthcare faded.

INDICES — VIX 17.5 down. IWM +2.16%, DIA +1.77%, IJR +2.03%, QQQ +1.31%, SPY +1.21%. Small caps beat large caps. Silver SLV +3.35%.

SECTORS — Energy +2.5%, Communication +1.8%, Technology +1.1%, Utilities +1.0%, Financials +0.9%, Materials +0.7%, Consumer Staples +0.6%, Real Estate +0.4%, Consumer Discretionary -0.5%, Industrials -0.5%, Healthcare -0.8%. Top Industries: XRT +2.90%, IBIT +2.83%; bottom: MSOS -0.25%, KWEB +1.16%.

THE 7s — Housing 7 +3.35%, Buildout 7 +2.58%, Fab 7 +2.36%, Semi 7 +1.85%. Strongest in Housing 7: DHI +0.9%; weakest in Semi 7: MRVL +3.36%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100% cut 0% hike 0%; Hawks 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), Neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), Doves 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly). USD liquidity stress 9/100 Calm, most-stressed SOFR Dispersion 9th percentile.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 48 Neutral. Top movers: SLV +3.35% cross-asset, MRVL +3.36% semis, VRT +4.0% buildout. 20d momentum best sector Energy +12.1%, worst Healthcare -2.0%; best basket Buildout 7 +12.73%, worst Housing 7 +7.67%. S&P 500 record high on Trump Iran de-escalation signal[3][4].

WATCH — SLV +3.35%, 20d momentum +12.10% breakout. DHI +0.9%, Housing 7 lead vol spike. VRT +4.0%, trend divergence vs semis. Flag Housing 7 strength.
